turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, uh, I need to reschedule my appointment. I have one this Friday but I have a work conflict.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: No problem at all. Can I get your name and which doctor the appointment is with?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Ananya Rao, and it's with Dr. Priti Joshi.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Found it — Friday 12 PM with Dr. Joshi. What dates or times would work better for you?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Anytime next week, preferably morning. Monday or Tuesday maybe?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Dr. Joshi has a slot on Tuesday at 9:30 AM. Shall I move your appointment there?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done! Your appointment has been rescheduled to Tuesday at 9:30 AM with Dr. Joshi. You'll get a confirmation SMS. Is there anything else?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're welcome, Ms. Rao. See you Tuesday!
